overall.description: A cinematic cyberpunk game sequence depicting a rainy night flight through a neon-lit futuristic city with a large aircraft overhead, transitioning to a subway station platform where a holographic woman interacts with the player. The footage features high-quality ray-traced lighting, atmospheric rain effects, and distinct cyberpunk aesthetics typical of AAA game engines like Cyberpunk 2077.

scene_state.functional_zone: aerial corridor between neon-lit commercial towers

events.description: flying aircraft overhead activates red warning lights on its underside
hard cut from aerial exterior to interior of subway train at station platform

agents.ego_description: sitting in a flying vehicle observing the rainy cyberpunk cityscape through the windshield, looking up at the aircraft above

notable_agents.action: large flying aircraft hovering overhead with bright spotlights scanning downward through the rain

large triangular architectural framework with glowing cyan neon edges
dark silhouettes of futuristic skyscrapers against the night sky

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view from inside a flying vehicle navigating through a rainy cyberpunk city at night. Bright neon holographic billboards illuminate the left side while a massive geometric pyramid structure with cyan neon edges dominates the right. A large aircraft hovers overhead, its spotlights cutting through the rain and atmospheric haze, before activating red warning lights as the scene transitions.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered subway station platform with holographic advertising

events.description: holographic woman on platform gestures with her arms toward the train window
pedestrians walk up the stairs in the background, briefly obscuring the view

agents.ego_description: observing the platform from inside a stationary subway train, watching the holographic advertisement

notable_agents.action: holographic woman with white face paint and red outfit gesturing and speaking, occasionally glitching

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase with metal railings leading up from the platform
grid of translucent ceiling panels emitting green neon light
wet concrete platform surface reflecting the green ceiling lights
large structural columns with yellow and black hazard stripes

segments.scene_description: The scene shifts to the interior of a subway train stopped at a station platform. A holographic woman stands just outside the window, gesturing toward the camera with glitching visual effects. The station features green neon ceiling panels, wide stairs in the background, and a reflective wet floor. Sparse pedestrians walk up the stairs in the background while the hologram continues its animated advertisement routine.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a rainy aerial flight through a neon-lit cityscape to the interior of a futuristic subway station. It begins from within a flying vehicle, gliding past bright holographic billboards and a massive geometric pyramid outlined in cyan neon. As a large aircraft hovers overhead, its spotlights cut through the atmospheric haze before red warning lights flash, signaling a shift in perspective. The scene then opens into the interior of a subway train stopped at a platform, where the lighting changes to green neon ceiling panels reflecting off a wet floor. Finally, the camera focuses on a glitching holographic woman gesturing from the platform as sparse pedestrians move toward wide stairs in the background.
